strategies.label: Enable GuardDuty (PR bundle)

dependency_checks.message: No specialized dependency checks are available for this strategy yet.

warnings: Apply the generated bundle to enable a GuardDuty detector in this region.
strategies.impact_text: Amazon GuardDuty will be enabled in this region.
strategies.decision_rationale: Compatibility resolver defaulted to the compatible profile 'guardduty_enable_pr_bundle' for strategy 'guardduty_enable_pr_bundle'.

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_medium__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'pr_only'. Risk is medium and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.00, privilege_level=1.00, internet_exposure=0.00, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it. Current execution surfaces stay PR-only, so this recommendation remains advisory until the reviewed bundle is applied.
